label: Ideo foundation
description: Defines a foundation for an ideoligion (e.g. deity-based). The foundationClass implements the generation and UI behavior for ideoligions built on this foundation.

foundationClass.label: Foundation class
foundationClass.description: C# IdeoFoundation subclass implementing this foundation's generation and UI behavior. Must derive from IdeoFoundation, which is abstract and cannot be used directly.

new-ideo-foundation.label: New ideo foundation
new-ideo-foundation.description: Minimal ideo foundation with a def name and label, leaving foundationClass for the user to fill in.
